description:
Fix Single Gallery View Layout and Display Issues

Resolve display and ordering problems in the single gallery view to ensure all gallery components render correctly and in the proper sequence.

Requirements:
- Fix gallery-meta component styling to display information cleanly and legibly
- Correct gallery-overlay positioning and appearance issues
- Reorder component rendering so gallery text/description appears above the image gallery
- Ensure proper spacing and alignment between all gallery sections (text, images, metadata, overlay)
- Test layout responsiveness across different screen sizes
- Verify overlay interactions (if applicable) function correctly after fixes
